Terms & Conditions

By using this website and participating in Beyond BARS Coaching programs, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

Use of This Website

This website is provided for informational purposes and to connect system-impacted women with coaching and community resources. You agree not to misuse this site or its content.

Coaching Services

Beyond BARS Coaching provides health and life coaching. Coaching is not therapy, medical advice, or legal advice. Always consult qualified professionals for medical, legal, or mental health concerns.

Donations

Donations made through this site support Beyond BARS Coaching, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization (EIN #33-1514564). Donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

Intellectual Property

All content on this site — including text, images, PDFs, and program materials — is the property of Beyond BARS Coaching and may not be reproduced without written permission.

Contact

Questions about these terms? Contact us at Vanessa.Ragains@gmail.com or text (650) 307-6592.

Supporting alcohol-free women in rebuilding safety, self-trust, and stability.

🏡 Beyond BARS Coaching, 501(c)(3), #33-1514564
